title: NINA SEAPOP — OIM Target Model
abstract: OIM-aligned GeoJSON Feature for NINA SEAPOP seabird colony observations. Extends oim-bio-tdwg with colonyID for persistent colony identity.
description:
## Target model design

This building block is the OIM-aligned transformation target for `nina-seapop-source`. It wraps source Darwin Core fields in a GeoJSON Feature and adds one extension property:

### `colonyID`

- **Type**: URI
- **Source**: derived from the source `locality` field by minting a URI per named colony
- **Semantic mapping**: `sosa:hasFeatureOfInterest` — the nesting colony as a place-entity, distinct from the taxon counted there
- **Pattern**: `https://seapop.no/colony/<locality-slug>` for SEAPOP data
- **Why URI not string**: enables time-series queries across years by colony identity; makes the colony a dereferenceable entity in a DT knowledge graph

## Fields excluded from this BB

The following OBIS enrichment fields are intentionally absent:

| OBIS field | Reason excluded |
|---|---|
| `aphiaID` | OBIS-resolved from WoRMS, not original source |
| `bathymetry` | GEBCO enrichment, not source measurement |
| `shoredistance` | GSHHS enrichment, not source measurement |
| `sst` | WOA climatological mean, not source measurement |
| `sss` | WOA climatological mean, not source measurement |

## Transformation from BB1

To transform a BB1 record to this BB2 form:
1. Create GeoJSON Feature with `geometry.coordinates: [decimalLongitude, decimalLatitude]`
2. Move all source Darwin Core fields to `properties`
3. Mint `colonyID` URI from `locality` (slugify: lowercase, replace spaces and special characters with hyphens)
4. Omit all OBIS enrichment fields

## Fields missing from OBIS view

The OBIS API does not return `eventDate`, `individualCount`, or `samplingProtocol`. For a complete OIM feature including temporal context and count data, use the GBIF source.
usageGuidance: colonyID must be a URI — use https://seapop.no/colony/<slug> for SEAPOP localities.
Geometry must be a GeoJSON Point from decimalLatitude/decimalLongitude.
All standard Darwin Core fields from oim-bio-tdwg are available; populate them from the source record.
Do not include OBIS enrichment fields (aphiaID, bathymetry, shoredistance, sst, sss) in this target form.
